infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: TourX uses the camera to scan QR codes, recognise landmarks, and power AR navigation.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: TourX uses your location for AR navigation, weather, crowd context, the travel journal, and Emergency SOS.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: TourX lets you attach photos to travel journal entries and landmark scans.

plugins.cameraPermission: TourX uses the camera to scan QR codes, recognise landmarks, and power AR navigation.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: TourX uses your location for AR navigation, weather, crowd context, the travel journal, and Emergency SOS.

plugins.photosPermission: TourX lets you attach photos to travel journal entries and landmark scans.
plugins.cameraPermission: TourX uses the camera to take photos for landmark scans and journal entries.
